presets.name: Soft Kiss
presets.prompt: The two people from the reference images face each other and share a gentle, tender, soft kiss. Smooth cinematic motion, warm soft lighting, natural facial expressions, eyes gently closing. Keep both faces consistent with the reference identities.

presets.name: Passionate Kiss
presets.prompt: The two people from the reference images share a passionate, deep romantic kiss with subtle head movement. Dramatic cinematic lighting, intimate close-up framing, smooth motion. Preserve both reference identities exactly.

presets.name: Forehead Kiss
presets.prompt: The first person from the reference images tenderly leans down and kisses the second person's forehead. Eyes softly closing, tender protective mood, soft golden light, gentle motion. Preserve both reference identities.

presets.name: Cheek Kiss
presets.prompt: The first person from the reference images gives a quick playful kiss on the second person's cheek with a small smile. Lighthearted mood, natural movement, soft daylight. Preserve both reference identities.

presets.name: Surprise Kiss
presets.prompt: One of the two people from the reference images suddenly leans in for an unexpected sweet kiss, the other's expression softens with surprise then joy. Spontaneous natural motion, warm light. Preserve both reference identities.

presets.name: Slow-Motion Kiss
presets.prompt: The two people from the reference images share a slow-motion romantic kiss with subtle hair movement. Golden hour cinematic light, shallow depth of field, dramatic and dreamy. Preserve both reference identities.

presets.name: Eskimo Kiss
presets.prompt: The two people from the reference images affectionately rub noses together in an Eskimo kiss while smiling at each other. Warm cozy lighting, soft playful motion. Preserve both reference identities.

presets.name: First Kiss
presets.prompt: The two people from the reference images share a shy first kiss, both leaning in slowly with eyes gently closing, slightly nervous expressions softening into tenderness. Soft natural light, intimate close-up. Preserve both reference identities.
